description: v0.16.4 D-S-002 regression-guard canary. Supabase .from().select().eq('tenant_id', ...) with the discriminant filter present in the chain. The scanner must NOT emit tenant-isolation-checker/CWE-639 — this is the baseline read-path suppression that predated D-S-002 and must continue to hold. Guards against over-broadening the write-payload helper into a read-path suppression or inadvertently breaking chain-walk recognition.
